description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8 Docker image and runs a global before_script of 'npm install'. Define a single job named test:node:8 in the default test stage that also uses the node:8 image. In this job execute the commands 'npm install -g codecov', then 'npm run pretest', then 'npm run test && codecov -t $codecov_token'. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are defined, and the job references the $codecov_token secret variable.
